hook.text: A radiologist using AI catches 96% of cancers. The radiologist alone catches 88%. The AI alone catches 85%.

buildup.text: Human-AI collaboration—augmented intelligence—combines human judgment with machine speed and pattern recognition.

discovery.text: The best results come from centaur teams: humans set strategy and make ethical calls; AI processes data and suggests options.

twist.text: Automation complacency is real—people over-trust AI output and stop questioning it. That's when errors multiply undetected.

climax.text: The future workplace requires a new skill: AI literacy—knowing when to trust AI, when to override it, and when to unplug it.

punchline.text: The future isn't human vs. AI. It's human with AI.

quiz.question: What is a 'centaur team' in human-AI collaboration?
options: Humans set strategy and ethics while AI processes data and suggests options
A team of only AI systems
A team that rejects all technology
